duplicates.title: Duplicate Review
duplicates.batch_confirm: Auto-clean {n} exact duplicate group(s)? Only identical copies (SHA256) will be removed — similar images must be reviewed manually. Originals will be kept.
duplicates.keep_confirm: Keep {name}, delete all others in this group?

settings.title: Settings
settings.label: Label
settings.ai_desc: Image analysis via LM Studio / OpenAI-compatible endpoint
settings.api_key_hint: Leave empty to keep existing key
settings.prompt_hint: The prompt controls how the AI analyzes images. Response must be valid JSON.
settings.geo_desc: Convert GPS coordinates to place names
settings.dup_raw_jpg_pair_hint: Off = pairs go to duplicate review for manual selection
settings.ocr_desc: Text recognition in images (screenshots, documents, signs)
settings.ocr_always: All images (including photos with signs, menus etc.)
settings.ocr_hint: "Smart" skips OCR for regular photos, "All images" also detects text on signs, posters etc.
settings.ocr_hint2: Note: OCR requires an active AI backend (AI Analysis must be enabled).
settings.immich_desc: Automatically upload photos and videos to Immich
settings.immich_api_key_hint: API key from Immich: Account Settings → API Keys
settings.immich_poll_desc: Automatically process new Immich uploads through the pipeline — tags, description and geodata are written to the file and the asset is replaced in Immich.
settings.appearance_desc: Language and theme of the web interface
settings.video_thumbnails_desc: Extract frames from videos for AI analysis (requires ffmpeg)
settings.video_thumbnail_frames_hint: Evenly distributed across video duration (1–50). Lower resolution = more frames possible.
settings.video_thumbnail_scale_hint: Percent of original resolution. 50% at 4K = 1080p, at 1080p = 540p.
settings.manual_hint: In manual mode, processing only runs on demand (Dashboard → Scan now).
settings.sorting_rules_desc: Static rules for file sorting — AI complements these when needed
settings.sorting_rules_hint: Rules are evaluated top to bottom — the first matching rule determines the target category. When AI analysis is enabled, it can improve the result: e.g. rescue a personal photo from «Sourceless» or «Unknown» when the static rule was too broad.
settings.sorting_rules_help:
Filename contains — Checks if the text appears in the filename (case insensitive).
Example: -WA matches IMG-20240101-WA0012.jpg

Filename pattern (Regex) — Regular expression matched against the full filename (case insensitive). Allows defining complex patterns.
Key regex building blocks:
. = any character   .* = any number of characters   \d = a digit (0–9)
[0-9a-f] = hex character   {4} = exactly 4 repetitions   ^ = start   $ = end
\. = a literal dot (must be escaped)   (a|b) = a or b   \w+ = one or more word characters
Examples:
• ^IMG_\d{8}_\d{6} — camera photos like IMG_20240315_143022.jpg
• ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}\.\w+$ — WhatsApp UUID files like a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890.jpg
• ^Screenshot — files starting with "Screenshot"
• (meme|sticker|gif) — files containing "meme", "sticker" or "gif" in the name

File extension — One or more extensions, comma-separated (with or without dot).
Example: .mp4,.mov,.avi matches common video formats

EXIF Expression — Freely definable conditions on EXIF fields. Combine multiple conditions with & (AND) or | (OR).

Operators:
!= "" = field is not empty   == "" = field is empty
== value = field equals value   != value = field does not equal value
~ value = field contains value   !~ value = field does not contain value

Available fields: make, model, date, gps, gps_lat, gps_lon, software, width, height, file_type, mime_type, has_exif, duration, megapixel

Examples:
• make != "" & date != "" — Has camera manufacturer AND capture date (real camera photo)
• make ~ Apple — Camera manufacturer contains "Apple" (iPhone photos)
• make ~ Canon | make ~ Nikon — Canon OR Nikon camera
• gps != "" & make != "" — Has GPS data AND camera info
• software ~ WhatsApp — Images edited by WhatsApp
• has_exif == False — File has no EXIF data (messenger images, downloads)
• width != "" & height != "" & make == "" — Has resolution but no camera info (screenshot/download)
settings.rule_fields_required: Condition, value and target are required
settings.cat_fields_required: Key, label and path are required
